name: Baked Sweet and Sour Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Italian salad dressing, low calorie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a small bowl, combine the marmalade, onion soup mix, green pepper, soy sauce, orange juice, and Italian salad dressing.
Spray a large pan or dish with non-stick cooking spray.
Place the chicken breasts in the pan and pour the sauce over the top.
Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes.
